message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for hyperloglog + geo (br-frankenredis-gz9f, br-frankenredis-ufar)

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_hyperloglog: 118/119 pass, 1 divergence
  - core_geo:         91/101 pass, 10 divergences

Divergences filed as review beads:
  - b2qs (P2): PFMERGE PTTL 2ms clock drift
  - kro2:      GEOPOS/GEOHASH decimal-precision + GEOSEARCH error wording

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
